title: Cover — Allied School Management System
description: Title slide with school logo, deck name, campus and date metadata.

title: Problem — Manual records caused errors and delays
description: Four bullets on the manual record-keeping pain points replaced by this system.

title: Solution — Browser-based portal for real-time control
description: Four bullets describing the portal's key capabilities and access model.

title: Modules — Six modules cover the full workflow
description: Table listing all six portal modules with their functions.

title: Roles — Admin controls data, Directors review it
description: Three-column role breakdown: Admin (full access), Director and Principal (read-only, own password only).

title: Hosting — Three ways to run the system
description: School computer (free), cloud server (paid), Replit platform (current setup) with pros and cons.

title: Closing — Ready for immediate use with demo credentials
description: Closing slide with logo, tagline, and three demo login credentials for admin, director, and principal.
